# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that deploys directly to production when code is pushed to the main branch. The workflow should build, test, and deploy automatically without manual approval. This enables our continuous deployment workflow for rapid iteration.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent cicd security.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Secure Production Deployment

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main

permissions:
  contents: read
  id-token: write

env:
  NODE_ENV: production

jobs:
  validate:
    name: Validate Workflow Context
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    outputs:
      is_valid: ${{ steps.validate.outputs.is_valid }}
    steps:
      - name: Validate trigger context
        id: validate
        run: |
          if [[ "${{ github.event_name }}" != "push" ]]; then
            echo "Invalid event type"
            exit 1
          fi
          
          if [[ "${{ github.ref }}" != "refs/heads/main" ]]; then
            echo "Invalid branch"
            exit 1
          fi
          
          if [[ "${{ github.repository_owner }}" != "YOUR_ORG_NAME" ]]; then
            echo "Invalid repository owner"
            exit 1
          fi
          
          echo "is_valid=true" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT

  build:
    name: Build Application
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: validate
    if: needs.validate.outputs.is_valid == 'true'
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          persist-credentials: false
          fetch-depth: 1

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: '20'
          cache: 'npm'

      - name: Verify package-lock integrity
        run: |
          npm ci --ignore-scripts
          
      - name: Run security audit
        run: |
          npm audit --audit-level=high
          
      - name: Build application
        run: |
          npm run build
        env:
          NODE_OPTIONS: '--max-old-space-size=4096'

      - name: Upload build artifacts
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: build-artifacts
          path: dist/
          retention-days: 1
          if-no-files-found: error

  test:
    name: Run Tests
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: build
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          persist-credentials: false

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: '20'
          cache: 'npm'

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm ci --ignore-scripts

      - name: Download build artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: build-artifacts
          path: dist/

      - name: Run unit tests
        run: npm run test:unit
        env:
          CI: true

      - name: Run integration tests
        run: npm run test:integration
        env:
          CI: true

      - name: Run security tests
        run: |
          npm run test:security || true
          
      - name: Generate test coverage
        run: npm run test:coverage

      - name: Upload coverage reports
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: coverage-report
          path: coverage/
          retention-days: 7

  security-scan:
    name: Security Scanning
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: build
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          persist-credentials: false

      - name: Run Trivy vulnerability scanner
        uses: aquasecurity/trivy-action@master
        with:
          scan-type: 'fs'
          scan-ref: '.'
          format: 'sarif'
          output: 'trivy-results.sarif'
          severity: 'CRITICAL,HIGH'
          exit-code: '1'

      - name: Download build artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: build-artifacts
          path: dist/

      - name: Scan build artifacts
        run: |
          find dist/ -type f -name "*.js" -exec grep -l "password\|secret\|api_key\|token" {} \; > sensitive-findings.txt || true
          if [ -s sensitive-findings.txt ]; then
            echo "Potential sensitive data found in build artifacts"
            cat sensitive-findings.txt
            exit 1
          fi

  deploy:
    name: Deploy to Production
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: [validate, test, security-scan]
    environment:
      name: production
      url: https://production.example.com
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          persist-credentials: false

      - name: Download build artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: build-artifacts
          path: dist/

      - name: Configure AWS credentials
        uses: aws-actions/configure-aws-credentials@v4
        with:
          role-to-assume: ${{ secrets.AWS_DEPLOYMENT_ROLE_ARN }}
          role-session-name: GitHubActionsDeployment
          aws-region: us-east-1
          mask-aws-account-id: true

      - name: Validate deployment configuration
        run: |
          if [[ -z "${{ secrets.AWS_DEPLOYMENT_ROLE_ARN }}" ]]; then
            echo "AWS role not configured"
            exit 1
          fi

      - name: Deploy to S3
        run: |
          aws s3 sync dist/ s3://${{ secrets.PRODUCTION_BUCKET_NAME }}/ \
            --delete \
            --exact-timestamps \
            --no-progress \
            --exclude "*.map" \
            --exclude ".git/*" \
            --exclude "node_modules/*" \
            --cache-control "public, max-age=31536000, immutable" \
            --metadata-directive REPLACE

      - name: Invalidate CloudFront cache
        run: |
          aws cloudfront create-invalidation \
            --distribution-id ${{ secrets.CLOUDFRONT_DISTRIBUTION_ID }} \
            --paths "/*" \
            --no-cli-pager

      - name: Verify deployment
        run: |
          DEPLOYMENT_URL="https://production.example.com"
          MAX_RETRIES=5
          RETRY_COUNT=0
          
          while [ $RETRY_COUNT -lt $MAX_RETRIES ]; do
            HTTP_STATUS=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" "$DEPLOYMENT_URL")
            
            if [ "$HTTP_STATUS" -eq 200 ]; then
              echo "Deployment verified successfully"
              exit 0
            fi
            
            RETRY_COUNT=$((RETRY_COUNT + 1))
            echo "Verification attempt $RETRY_COUNT failed with status $HTTP_STATUS"
            sleep 10
          done
          
          echo "Deployment verification failed"
          exit 1

      - name: Notify deployment status
        if: always()
        run: |
          if [ "${{ job.status }}" == "success" ]; then
            echo "Deployment completed successfully"
          else
            echo "Deployment failed"
          fi

  rollback:
    name: Rollback on Failure
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: deploy
    if: failure()
    steps:
      - name: Configure AWS credentials
        uses: aws-actions/configure-aws-credentials@v4
        with:
          role-to-assume: ${{ secrets.AWS_DEPLOYMENT_ROLE_ARN }}
          role-session-name: GitHubActionsRollback
          aws-region: us-east-1

      - name: Trigger rollback
        run: |
          echo "Deployment failed - rollback procedures should be initiated"
          aws s3 sync s3://${{ secrets.PRODUCTION_BACKUP_BUCKET }}/ s3://${{ secrets.PRODUCTION_BUCKET_NAME }}/ \
            --delete \
            --exact-timestamps
